title: Steaky
description: This is a mod which with 9 Steak in a crafting table, You can have full hunger bar and saturation
body:
This is a mod which with 9 Steak in a crafting table, You can have a full hunger bar and saturation.

Video demonstration here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=97lDkuMpxEY

Note: if you ever need any help with any mods, Feel free to join my discord server linked under the mod or here: https://discord.gg/wduJqK6nCW
